misconfig_patterns: AllowAllAuthenticator in default deployment — CQL wire fully open
CQL OPTIONS handshake returns SUPPORTED without authentication challenge
Vector<float,N> column type (Cassandra 5.0+) detectable via DESCRIBE TABLE

active_probe.false_positive_check: CQL OPTIONS response must include CQL_VERSION in SUPPORTED map — distinguishes from generic TCP

deployment_tells: CQL wire at :9042 — cqlsh host 9042 connects without credentials with AllowAllAuthenticator
CQL OPTIONS response contains SUPPORTED map with CQL_VERSION
DESCRIBE TABLE {t} reveals vector<float,N> type for AI workload detection
pivot_paths: cqlsh host 9042 → DESCRIBE KEYSPACES; → keyspace list
SELECT * FROM system.local → cluster name + release_version
